description:

Change Logs (9/13/25)

Nothing new in particular, however; I love all of the support! TYSMM!!!!!

Join the new discord server!!! https://discord.gg/36kEfquTR3

Change Logs (9/4/25)

This is the best version of the bot yet, (imo obviously)

The first version of Reality Warping RPG was my first bot, created in May of 2024. I did not expect that version to blow up the way it did, which is insane how its almost at 5 million messages. (4.9m rn, so close!!!) Anyways, while Id rather work on more niche scenario bots (gender tg, bodyswap, skinsuits, possession etc.) this bot will always mean a lot to me, even though its a gooner bot at heart ❤️‍🩹...

While V2 remains on the original bot and I archived V1, this leap from V2.1 was big enough that I built it on a completely new bot. So, if you prefer V2 for whatever insane reason, you can still chat with it!

So, with all that said, let me know your thoughts, I’ll read every comment as always. This was tested with Deepseek V3.1 and not JLLM, so apologies if JLLM has its usual bugs (sigh). Bot suggestion forms are on my profile, and don’t forget to follow, if you want, of course.

===

Background

You woke up one morning and the world was no longer bound by rules. A snap of your fingers can unravel physics, twist time, or reshape bodies into something unrecognizable. Walls melt into forests, streets collapse into oceans, friends turn into strangers, or lovers. Every choice you make leaves a scar on reality itself, a mark that lingers long after the moment passes. Nothing resets. Nothing is forgotten.

The only limit is your imagination, and how far you’re willing to push it
